rows.strict_supervisor_conclusion: This package intentionally keeps window 002 locked out of fitting, keeps 007/008/010 as reference only, uses 001/004/006/009 as auxiliary training context, and promotes only the cleanest released negative windows into primary fitting.

interpretation: The package is intentionally not a raw export of the ledger; it applies stricter fitting tiers.
Window 002 remains locked, window 008 remains reference-only, and only clean released negative windows enter primary fit.
Auxiliary fit is reserved for support, bridge, and non-final positive context windows.
